typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Body_Failure as string (),
	Body_Succ as string (),
	DepartmentList as string (),
	DepartmentName as string (),
	FilePath as string (),
	MailRecepient as string (),
	MailSender as string (),
	MailSubject as string (),
	RecievedFilePath as string (),
	Status as string (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_datediff as integer (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_project as string (),
	DestinationFolder as string (),
	LocalFolder as string ()
}

source(output(
		JobTitle as string,
		Department as string,
		HourlyRate as string,
		ActiveFlag as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> ExtractDatafromCSV
ExtractDatafromCSV derive(ETLCreateDate = $System__StartTime) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		Department as string,
		ETLCreatedDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		JobTitle as string,
		ActiveFlag as string,
		HourlyRate as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Department,
		ETLCreatedDate = ETLCreateDate,
		JobTitle,
		ActiveFlag,
		HourlyRate)) ~> OLEDBDestination
